docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,885.24 FILED BY DENHAM, TONYA AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTON, VERANIECE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DENHAM, TONYA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DENHAM, TONYA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $30.80 - SERVED JUN-10-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTON, VERANIECE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY DENHAM, TONYA SUTTON, VERANIECE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DENHAM, TONYA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SUTTON, VERANIECE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PRESENT SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT DAMAGED HER PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
